---
title: "Gibbs Prior Log Z Comparison"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r}
setwd("/Users/brandonmarks/Desktop/Research/Palacios Lab/Untitled/Enertree/Brandon/gibbs_prior")

library(ape)
library(phylodyn)
library(phangorn)
library(phyclust)
library(phylotools)
library(fmatrix)
library(coda)
library(ggplot2)

source("utils.R")

output_root <- file.path("plots", "logZ_comparison")
dir.create(output_root, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
source("gibbs_prior_joint_standardized_helpers.R")

annotate_summary <- function(summary_df, sampler_type, init_type, include_log_Z) {
  summary_df$sampler_type <- sampler_type
  summary_df$init_type <- init_type
  summary_df$include_log_Z <- include_log_Z
  summary_df
}
```

## Shared Data

```{r}
n_tips <- 25
set.seed(123)

sequences <- as.phyDat(read.FASTA("sequences.fasta"))

M_true_tree <- read.tree("true_tree.newick")
inter_coal_times <- coalescent.intervals(M_true_tree)$interval.length
inter_coal_times[which(inter_coal_times <= 0.000001)] <- 0.0000001
true_coalescent_times <- cumsum(inter_coal_times)
M_true_fmat <- gen_Fmat(M_true_tree, tol = 8)
```

### Reference Matrices

```{r}
dm <- dist.hamming(sequences)

upgma_tree <- upgma(dm)
upgma_tree <- update_time(upgma_tree, true_coalescent_times)
M_upgma_fmat <- gen_Fmat(upgma_tree, tol = 8)
```

### BEAST Reference Data

```{r}
trees_beast_compare <- read.nexus("HKY1000Gibbs-sequences.trees")
beast_compare_fmats <- lapply(trees_beast_compare, gen_Fmat, tol = 8)
```

### Shared Log Z Cache

```{r}
uniform_tree_cache <- generate_proposal_tree_chain_cache(
  n_trees = 100000,
  n_tips = n_tips
)
```

# Joint Standardized

## UPGMA Init, Log Z = TRUE

```{r}
joint_upgma_logZ_true_result <- run_joint_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "joint_upgma_logZ_true",
  init_M = M_upgma_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  n_iter = 10000,
  beta_init = 1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  prior_sd = 1,
  proposal_sd = 0.5,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = TRUE,
  uniform_tree_cache = uniform_tree_cache
)

joint_upgma_logZ_true_summary <- annotate_summary(
  render_mh_experiment(
    result = joint_upgma_logZ_true_result,
    experiment_id = "joint_upgma_logZ_true",
    comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, joint_upgma_logZ_true_result$average_M),
    comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
    beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
    coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
    sequences = sequences,
    sub_samp = 1000,
    seed = 44
  ),
  sampler_type = "joint",
  init_type = "upgma",
  include_log_Z = TRUE
)
```

## UPGMA Init, Log Z = FALSE

```{r}
joint_upgma_logZ_false_result <- run_joint_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "joint_upgma_logZ_false",
  init_M = M_upgma_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  n_iter = 10000,
  beta_init = 1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  prior_sd = 1,
  proposal_sd = 0.5,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = FALSE,
  uniform_tree_cache = uniform_tree_cache
)

joint_upgma_logZ_false_summary <- annotate_summary(
  render_mh_experiment(
    result = joint_upgma_logZ_false_result,
    experiment_id = "joint_upgma_logZ_false",
    comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, joint_upgma_logZ_false_result$average_M),
    comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
    beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
    coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
    sequences = sequences,
    sub_samp = 1000,
    seed = 45
  ),
  sampler_type = "joint",
  init_type = "upgma",
  include_log_Z = FALSE
)
```

## True Init, Log Z = TRUE

```{r}
joint_true_init_logZ_true_result <- run_joint_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "joint_true_init_logZ_true",
  init_M = M_true_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  n_iter = 10000,
  beta_init = 1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  prior_sd = 1,
  proposal_sd = 0.5,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = TRUE,
  uniform_tree_cache = uniform_tree_cache
)

joint_true_init_logZ_true_summary <- annotate_summary(
  render_mh_experiment(
    result = joint_true_init_logZ_true_result,
    experiment_id = "joint_true_init_logZ_true",
    comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, joint_true_init_logZ_true_result$average_M),
    comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
    beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
    coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
    sequences = sequences,
    sub_samp = 1000,
    seed = 46
  ),
  sampler_type = "joint",
  init_type = "true_init",
  include_log_Z = TRUE
)
```

## True Init, Log Z = FALSE

```{r}
joint_true_init_logZ_false_result <- run_joint_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "joint_true_init_logZ_false",
  init_M = M_true_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  n_iter = 10000,
  beta_init = 1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  prior_sd = 1,
  proposal_sd = 0.5,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = FALSE,
  uniform_tree_cache = uniform_tree_cache
)

joint_true_init_logZ_false_summary <- annotate_summary(
  render_mh_experiment(
    result = joint_true_init_logZ_false_result,
    experiment_id = "joint_true_init_logZ_false",
    comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, joint_true_init_logZ_false_result$average_M),
    comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
    beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
    coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
    sequences = sequences,
    sub_samp = 1000,
    seed = 47
  ),
  sampler_type = "joint",
  init_type = "true_init",
  include_log_Z = FALSE
)
```

# Mean Updated

## UPGMA Init, Log Z = FALSE

```{r}
mean_upgma_logZ_false_result <- run_mean_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "mean_upgma_logZ_false",
  init_M = M_upgma_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  update_time = 500,
  n_iter = 100000,
  beta = 0.1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  prior_sd = 1,
  proposal_sd = 0.5,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = FALSE,
  uniform_tree_cache = uniform_tree_cache
)

mean_upgma_logZ_false_summary <- annotate_summary(
  render_mh_experiment(
    result = mean_upgma_logZ_false_result,
    experiment_id = "mean_upgma_logZ_false",
    comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, nearby_Fmat(mean_upgma_logZ_false_result$average_M)),
    comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
    beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
    coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
    sequences = sequences,
    sub_samp = 1000,
    seed = 49
  ),
  sampler_type = "mean",
  init_type = "upgma",
  include_log_Z = FALSE
)
```

## True Init, Log Z = FALSE

```{r}
mean_true_init_logZ_false_result <- run_mean_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "mean_true_init_logZ_false",
  init_M = M_true_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  update_time = 1000,
  n_iter = 10000,
  beta = 0.1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  prior_sd = 1,
  proposal_sd = 0.5,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = FALSE,
  uniform_tree_cache = uniform_tree_cache
)

mean_true_init_logZ_false_summary <- annotate_summary(
  render_mh_experiment(
    result = mean_true_init_logZ_false_result,
    experiment_id = "mean_true_init_logZ_false",
    comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, nearby_Fmat(mean_true_init_logZ_false_result$average_M)),
    comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
    beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
    coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
    sequences = sequences,
    sub_samp = 1000,
    seed = 51
  ),
  sampler_type = "mean",
  init_type = "true_init",
  include_log_Z = FALSE
)
```

# BEAST Reference

```{r}
trees_beast_ess <- read.nexus("100THOUSANDTREES-sequences.trees")
beast_ess_fmats <- lapply(trees_beast_ess, gen_Fmat, tol = 8)

beast_uniform_mds_sub_samp <- min(1000, length(beast_ess_fmats))
set.seed(52)
beast_uniform_idx <- sample(length(beast_ess_fmats), beast_uniform_mds_sub_samp)
beast_uniform_beast_fmats <- beast_ess_fmats[beast_uniform_idx]

uniform_ess_encodings <- rEncod(
  m = beast_uniform_mds_sub_samp,
  n = n_tips,
  distr = "uniform"
)
uniform_ess_fmats <- lapply(uniform_ess_encodings, Fmat_from_myencod)

beast_uniform_mds_fmats <- c(beast_uniform_beast_fmats, uniform_ess_fmats)
beast_uniform_mds_labels <- c(
  rep("BEAST", length(beast_uniform_beast_fmats)),
  rep("Uniform", length(uniform_ess_fmats))
)

beast_uniform_mds_colors <- c("BEAST" = "steelblue", "Uniform" = "tomato")

beast_uniform_mds_D <- matrix(0, length(beast_uniform_mds_fmats), length(beast_uniform_mds_fmats))
for (i in 2:length(beast_uniform_mds_fmats)) {
  for (j in 1:(i - 1)) {
    beast_uniform_mds_D[i, j] <- distance_Fmat(
      beast_uniform_mds_fmats[[i]],
      beast_uniform_mds_fmats[[j]],
      dist = "l2"
    )^2
    beast_uniform_mds_D[j, i] <- beast_uniform_mds_D[i, j]
  }
}

beast_uniform_mds <- cmdscale(as.dist(beast_uniform_mds_D), k = 2, eig = TRUE)
beast_uniform_coords <- as.data.frame(beast_uniform_mds$points)
colnames(beast_uniform_coords) <- c("Dim1", "Dim2")
beast_uniform_coords$group <- factor(beast_uniform_mds_labels, levels = c("BEAST", "Uniform"))

p_beast_uniform <- ggplot(beast_uniform_coords, aes(x = Dim1, y = Dim2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = beast_uniform_mds_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "BEAST Trees vs Uniform F Matrices",
    x = "MDS 1",
    y = "MDS 2",
    color = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

print(p_beast_uniform)
make_experiment_dirs("beast_uniform_mds")
ggsave(
  filename = paste0("plots/", save_path_for("beast_uniform_mds", "beast_vs_uniform_mds.png")),
  plot = p_beast_uniform,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 150
)

beast_summary <- annotate_summary(
  render_beast_experiment(
    beast_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
    experiment_id = "beast",
    coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
    sequences = sequences,
    sub_samp = 1000,
    seed = 47
  ),
  sampler_type = "beast_reference",
  init_type = "beast",
  include_log_Z = NA
)

matrix_chain_ess_heatmap(
  beast_ess_fmats,
  title = "beast: BEAST Unsampled ESS",
  save_path = save_path_for("beast", "unsampled_ess.png")
)

matrix_chain_ess_heatmap(
  beast_ess_fmats,
  normalize = TRUE,
  per_n_samples = 1000,
  title = "beast: BEAST Unsampled ESS per 1000 samples",
  save_path = save_path_for("beast", "unsampled_ess_per_1000.png")
)
```

# Summary

```{r}
experiment_summary <- rbind(
  joint_upgma_logZ_true_summary,
  joint_upgma_logZ_false_summary,
  joint_true_init_logZ_true_summary,
  joint_true_init_logZ_false_summary,
  mean_upgma_logZ_false_summary,
  mean_true_init_logZ_false_summary,
  beast_summary
)

print(experiment_summary)

write.csv(
  experiment_summary,
  file = file.path(output_root, "experiment_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  experiment_summary,
  file = file.path(output_root, "experiment_summary.rds")
)
```
